items.name: Headless Aura Fly Levitate Pose
items.description:
🌀Headless Aura Levitate Pose 🌀
Defy gravity and play with your own aura. ✨

A unique levitation animation where your avatar floats while tossing their head in the air and catching it with style. A mysterious and powerful aura moment that instantly makes your avatar stand out.

Perfect for edits, aura farming, idle showcases and dominating the server with pure main character energy.

Your avatar levitates calmly while controlling their floating head and radiating dark aura energy.

Perfect for:
🌀 Aura moments
✨ Aura farming edits
🌑 Dark aesthetic avatars
🔥 Sigma / main character energy
🎮 Idle showcase animations
🎥 Roblox edits & clips

Break gravity. Control the aura. Own the moment.
